caption: The video provides a close-up view of a vehicle's engine bay, focusing on the mechanical components of the motor, hoses, and reservoirs. In the initial frames, the lighting is bright and natural, clearly showing the metallic surfaces of the engine block and the black plastic of the fluid reservoirs. As the sequence progresses, the lighting shifts dramatically, becoming dim and tinted with a blue-green hue. In the final frames, a glowing, bright green streak of light appears to move quickly across the right side of the engine compartment, cutting through the darkened scene. No people, text, or logos are visible throughout the clip. The only significant change between the frames is the transition from daylight to a dark environment and the sudden appearance of the neon green light effect.
